subcodes.first_line: O seeker of truth! Thy letter was received. I beseech God that thou mayest remain firm and steadfast amidst the tests and trials [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جوینده حقیقت نامه ات رسید از خدا خواهم ثابت و مستقیم مانی و از امتحانات
subcodes.subjects: @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
